calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Dennis G. Mesina, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Benito Solis, who was placed under oath and examined. Mr. Mesina also appeared for plaintiff Carmen Solis, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Frances Torres.
Default was entered against defendant on December 19, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 11, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Benito Solis and Carmen Solis, and against the Defaulted Defendant Frances Torres as follows:

Damages/Principal - $44,324.96.
Costs - $444.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $44,769.46.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS BENITO SOLIS AND CARMEN SOLIS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.
APPEARANCES: Dennis G. Mesina, Esq. 788-8811 for pltfs & moving parties; Frances Torres, 650/455-6556 deft & opposing party in propria persona w/ father Frank Torres, 650/243-8253.
RULING: Argued and the Court granted plaintiff's request for preliminary injunction. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
